course.title: Introduction to Chemistry
course.syllabus:
CHEM-101 · Introduction to Chemistry

This course introduces matter, atomic structure, and chemical bonding. Grading: 60% assignments, 40% participation. Late work loses 10% per day.

items.title: Welcome & Overview
items.body:
Welcome to CHEM-101!

This week we ask the oldest question in chemistry: what is stuff made of?

  • Read the LibreTexts chapter below
  • Sign the lab safety contract
  • Introduce yourself in the discussion

items.title: Lab Safety Contract
items.body: Download the safety contract, sign it, and upload a scan or photo.

items.title: Introduce yourself
items.body: Say hi! Share your name, program, and one thing you want to learn in this course.

items.title: Atomic structure
items.body:
Atoms

Protons, neutrons, electrons — and why the periodic table looks the way it does.

items.title: Atoms checkpoint
items.description: A quick check on atomic structure. One attempt.

questions.text: What is the charge of a proton?
What is the chemical symbol for gold?
What is the atomic number of carbon?
Explain in your own words what an isotope is.
